items.claim: Kong Wang has shown improved takedown defense in recent performances.
items.quote: I like the improvements that we've seen in the takedown defense.

items.claim: Kong Wang has become more patient and disciplined with her hand positioning during fights.
items.quote: what I like about Kong Wang, she's looked a little bit more patient to me. Looked a little bit more dialed in. Not holding her hand super low

items.claim: Kong Wang possesses a striking and power advantage over Tracy Cortez.
items.quote: She's got the power advantage. She's got the striking advantage.

items.claim: Tracy Cortez lacks the knockout power to punish Kong Wang for fighting with her hands down.
items.quote: I don't think Tracy has, you know, power like someone like a Gabriella Fernandez to be able to make, you know, Kong Wang pay

items.claim: Luke Riley has excellent Muay Thai and sharp boxing skills.
items.quote: Undefeated, excellent Muay Thai, very, very sharp boxing.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka III has a significant experience advantage over Luke Riley.
items.quote: Kai Kamaka is a guy that's got a ton of experience, right? 187 and one, tons of experience.

items.claim: Kai Kamaka III is highly durable.
Kai Kamaka III holds a grappling advantage over Luke Riley.
items.quote: I think in this fight, he has the advantage with the grappling.

items.claim: Luke Riley possesses a power and versatility advantage over Kai Kamaka III.
items.quote: He's got the power advantage. He's got the I'd say the versatility advantage.
